name: Tsuru-Puru-Purun
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 WATER monster in your Main Monster Zone; destroy that monster you control, and if you do, Special Summon this card to the zone that monster was in, then you can destroy all face-up cards your opponent controls in this card's column. You can only use this effect of "Tsuru-Puru-Purun" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 WATER monster in your Main Monster Zone; destroy that monster you control, and if you do, Special Summon this card to the zone that monster was in, then you can destroy all face-up cards your opponent controls in this card's column. You can only use this effect of "Tsuru-Puru-Purun" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 WATER monster in your Main Monster Zone; destroy that monster you control, and if you do, Special Summon this card to the zone that monster was in, then you can destroy all face-up cards your opponent controls in this card's column. You can only use this effect of "Tsuru-Puru-Purun" once per turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
